allow: Bash(cmd //c 'if not exist C:\\Android-SDK mklink /J C:\\Android-SDK "C:\\Users\\Александр\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk"')

PowerShell(cmd /c rmdir 'C:\\Android-SDK'; New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path 'C:\\Android-SDK' -Target "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk" | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Android-SDK' | Select-Object -First 5 Name)

PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\Alexandr'\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path 'C:\\Users\\Alexandr' -Target 'C:\\Users\\Александр' | Out-Null }; Get-Item 'C:\\Users\\Alexandr' | Select-Object FullName, LinkType, Target)

PowerShell($err = $null; $tokens = $null; [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\html2apk\\html2apk.ps1", [ref]$tokens, [ref]$err\) | Out-Null; if \($err.Count\) { $err | Select-Object Message, @{n='Line';e={$_.Extent.StartLineNumber}} | Format-List } else { 'syntax ok' })

PowerShell($desktop = [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\); $linkPath = Join-Path $desktop 'Html2Apk.lnk'; $ws = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $sc = $ws.CreateShortcut\($linkPath\); $sc.TargetPath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\html2apk\\html2apk.bat"; $sc.WorkingDirectory = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\html2apk"; $sc.IconLocation = 'shell32.dll,12'; $sc.Description = 'Html2Apk Builder - конвертер playable HTML в Android APK'; $sc.Save\(\); Test-Path $linkPath; \(Get-Item $linkPath\).Length)

PowerShell(function Invoke-CmdCapture { param\([string]$exe,[string[]]$argv,[string]$cwd,[hashtable]$envExtra=@{}\); $quoted=@\(\); foreach \($a in $argv\) { if \($a -match '[\\s"]'\) { $quoted += '"' + \($a -replace '"','\\"'\) + '"' } else { $quoted += $a } }; $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo; $psi.FileName=$exe; $psi.Arguments=\($quoted -join ' '\); if \($cwd\) {$psi.WorkingDirectory=$cwd}; $psi.RedirectStandardOutput=$true; $psi.RedirectStandardError=$true; $psi.UseShellExecute=$false; $psi.CreateNoWindow=$true; $p=[System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start\($psi\); $o=$p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd\(\); $e=$p.StandardError.ReadToEnd\(\); $p.WaitForExit\(\); @{ExitCode=$p.ExitCode;Stdout=$o;Stderr=$e} }; $r = Invoke-CmdCapture -exe 'C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe' -argv @\('--version'\) -cwd 'C:\\temp'; "exit=$\($r.ExitCode\) stdout=$\($r.Stdout.Trim\(\)\)")

PowerShell($src = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads\\Gemini_Generated_Image_8rolru8rolru8rol.png"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $src\)\) { throw "Source PNG not found: $src" }; $tpl = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\html2apk\\template\\default-app-icon.png"; Copy-Item $src $tpl -Force; "PNG copied: $tpl \($\([math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $tpl\).Length/1KB,1\)\) KB\)"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($src\); "PNG dims: $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)"; $img.Dispose\(\))
